creator: freebsdports@chillibear.com
text:
Part of the set of ports for the sysutil gems.

A Ruby interface for getting filesystem information. 

http://rubyforge.org/docman/view.php/610/1562/sys-filesystem.html

***
Please note that this port has a dependency on this PR: ports/149376 (Test::Unit)
***

How-To-Repeat: n/a
